creator: ben.rubson@gmx.com
text:
grep also fails with case :

# echo AAA > test
# grep a test
# grep "[a-z]" test
AAA
# echo BBB | grep "[a-z]"
BBB

# grep -V
grep (GNU grep) 2.5.1-FreeBSD
# uname -r
11.0-RC3

Quite dangerous issue, could we think about having it corrected for FreeBSD 11 release ?

Many thanks,

Ben
